task_completion.description: Verify the document contains the correct title and subtitle with appropriate heading styles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'IT Incident Management Process' visually styled as a main heading (Heading 1) and 'Standard Operating Procedure — ITIL Framework' styled as a subheading (Heading 2) at the top of the document.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of the required introductory paragraph.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the paragraph starting with 'This document outlines the five-stage incident management process...' and ending with '...restore normal operations as quickly as possible.' below the headings.

task_completion.description: Verify a SmartArt process diagram has been inserted into the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graphical process diagram (SmartArt) inserted below the introductory paragraph. It should have a sequence of shapes indicating a process flow.

task_completion.description: Verify the SmartArt diagram contains exactly five steps with the correct labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the text inside the SmartArt shapes. There must be exactly five shapes labeled exactly: 'Identify', 'Log', 'Diagnose', 'Resolve', and 'Close'.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of a numbered list describing the five steps below the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a numbered list (1-5) below the SmartArt diagram containing the descriptions for Identify, Log, Diagnose, Resolve, and Close as specified in the task.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the title bar of the Microsoft Word window to see 'incident_management_process.docx' or look for a Save As dialog/File Explorer window confirming the file is saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Microsoft Word 2010 graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Microsoft Word 2010 application window with the ribbon interface, not a terminal, script editor, or alternative word processor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual SmartArt feature rather than pasting an image or manually drawing shapes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'SmartArt Tools' ribbon tabs (Design/Format) being active when the diagram is selected, or the SmartArt text pane being used to enter the labels.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use command-line tools to generate the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no PowerShell, Command Prompt, or Python scripts visible generating the .docx file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document must be saved as 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\incident_management_process.docx'. The SmartArt diagram must have exactly 5 steps labeled: 'Identify', 'Log', 'Diagnose', 'Resolve', 'Close'. The title must be 'IT Incident Management Process' and the subtitle must be 'Standard Operating Procedure — ITIL Framework'.
